questions.q: If A is a square matrix of order 3 and |A| = 5, then find the value of |3A|.
Prove that Δ = \| 1  a  a^2 \| = \| 1  b  b^2 \| = \| 1  c  c^2 \| if a + b + c = 0.
questions.answer: Apply row operations and properties of determinants to prove the given statement.

questions.q: Fill in the blank: The value of the determinant of a diagonal matrix is the _______________ of its diagonal elements.

If the area of the triangle with vertices (1, 2), (3, -4), and (-1, 2) is 15 square units, then find the value of k so that the area of the triangle formed by the vertices (1, 2k), (3, -4), and (-1, 2) is 60 square units.
questions.answer: Use the formula for the area of a triangle in terms of the determinant and solve for k.

questions.q: True or False: If A and B are two square matrices of the same order, then |AB| = |A||B|.
Find the value of x if \| 2  x  6 \| = 0.
questions.answer: Expand the determinant along the first row and solve for x.

questions.q: If A is a square matrix of order 3 and |A| = 2, then find the value of |adj A|.
Prove that \| a  b  c \| = \| a  b  c \|.
questions.answer: Apply properties of determinants, such as the expansion along rows or columns.

questions.q: If A = \| 2  1 \|, B = \| 3  2 \|, then find the value of |A| + |B|.
